subcodes.title: Words to several women in the house of Abdu'l-Baha on 20 Jan 1910, spoken on 1910-01-20
subcodes.first_line: Oh, meine Schwester, aus deinem Munde spricht der gewaltige Stolz des Briten. Überlege dir einmal, liebt nicht jeder Mensch
subcodes.subjects: @past, present and future of Iran, @historical episodes and the lessons of the past, @language and the structure of reality, @universal language, @Zoroastrianism; Mahabad and Zoroaster
